basics.name: Bo Pang
basics.label: Ph.D. candidate, Zhejiang University
basics.summary: Ph.D. candidate at Zhejiang University working on 3D perception and autonomous navigation, with interests in LiDAR place recognition, 3D multi-object tracking, and sign-aware map-light navigation.

publications.name: PB-MOT: Pose-aware Association Boosted Online 3D Multi-Object Tracking
publications.publisher: 2025 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)

publications.name: PB-MOT++: Extending Pose-aware Association to Trajectory-Centric Offline Optimization
publications.summary: Trajectory-centric offline optimization built on pose-aware association.

publications.name: Semantic-Aware Sparse-Map Retrieval for Robust LiDAR Localization
publications.publisher: Manuscript in revision for journal resubmission
publications.summary: Semantic-aware sparse-map retrieval for robust LiDAR localization.

presentations.name: PB-MOT: Pose-aware Association Boosted Online 3D Multi-Object Tracking
presentations.event: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)

portfolio.name: Vision-Language Navigation with Coarse Maps and Semantic Landmarks
portfolio.description: Explored semantic landmarks and coarse maps for language-guided localization and route reasoning.

portfolio.name: Semantic Sparse-Map Retrieval and Loop Closure Detection
portfolio.description: Investigated semantic sparse-map retrieval and loop closure detection for LiDAR-based localization.

portfolio.name: Trajectory-Centric 3D Multi-Object Tracking
portfolio.description: Developed pose-aware online tracking and trajectory-centric offline optimization for KITTI 3D multi-object tracking.
